docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JPT TODD WENZEL FILED BY FABIANO, FRANK
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER FABIANO, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT DOO, SHIN DBA DC CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2012 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-24-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR AND PROVIDE FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS FOR THE COURT TO REVIEW FOR POSSIBLE INCREASE IN MONTHLY PAYMENTS. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER TED KIM APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL CONTINUE TO MAKE $100.00 PAYMENTS TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR PER MONTH. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WHO IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER TED KIM. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FABIANO, FRANK ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE ON SUBPOENA ISSUED TO SHIN DOO FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2011 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO COMPLETE THE SC-133 FORM AS BEST HE CAN. KOREAN INTERPRETER IS ORDERED TO ASSIST THE DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT IS REDUCED TO $5000.00 PLUS COSTS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPROTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FABIANO, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT DOO, SHIN DBA DC CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DOO, SHIN DBA DC CONSTRUCTION HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SHIN DOO

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2011 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-05-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR KOREAN INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOO, SHIN DBA DC CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM TODD WENZEL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (506). PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FABIANO, FRANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOO, SHIN DBA DC CONSTRUCTION $6,638.31 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,638.31, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-07-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DOANLD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DOO, SHIN DBA DC CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-10-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT IS TO PAY $100/ MONTH BEGINNING ON JANUARY 15, 2012", PER JUDGE-DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KOREAN INTERPRETER. KOREAN ORDERED FOR DEFENDANT 12/6/11.CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506). APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-06-2011 (SERVICE FEE $95.00) AS TO DEFENDANT DOO, SHIN DBA DC CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-05-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO COMPLETE ANOTHER SC-133 INDICATING INFORMATION RELATING TO HIS BANK ACCOUNT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2011 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-19-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
